appraisal_events.evidence: « Bloch lui coupa la parole. » ... « Vraiment... je ne savais absolument pas cela – comme s’il était étrange qu’il ne le sût pas. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Bloch as pretentious and socially gauche: he interrupts and then announces his ignorance with a tone the narrator marks as absurdly self-important. Mme de Villeparisis’s correction of his generalization also undercuts him.

status_effects.explanation: Locally lowered by the narrator’s depiction of his interruption and tone-deaf self-display.
